name: cyto_spleen_subset
label: Cytometry Spleen Subset
summary: Flow cytometry data of spleens of 9 mice, subsampled to 1000 cells per sample.
description: Flow cytometry data of spleens from 4 WT (IKK2 fl/fl CD11c-cre +/+) and 5 KO (IKK2 fl/fl CD11c-cre Tg/+) B6 mice,  measured with a 22-color panel on 2 different instrument settings. Subsampled to 1000 cells per sample. Data has been preprocessed (compensated witha batch-specific compensation matrix, logicle transformed, cleaned with PeacoQC and pregated on live single CD45+ cells).
